titles.en: Faithfulness versus faithlessness in divine and human relations
Faithfulness versus faithlessness in divine and human relations

segments: ٢٥٩. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): الْوَفَاءُ لِأَهْلِ الْغَدْرِ غَدْرٌ عِنْدَ اللهِ، وَالْغَدْرُ بَأَهْلِ الْغَدْرِ وَفَاءٌ عِنْدَ اللهِ.
arabic.text: ٢٥٩. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): الْوَفَاءُ لِأَهْلِ الْغَدْرِ غَدْرٌ عِنْدَ اللهِ، وَالْغَدْرُ بَأَهْلِ الْغَدْرِ وَفَاءٌ عِنْدَ اللهِ.

segments: 259. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Faithfulness with faithless people is faithlessness with Allāh, while faithlessness with faithless people is faithfulness with Allāh.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: 259. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Faithfulness with faithless people is faithlessness with Allāh, while faithlessness with faithless people is faithfulness with Allāh.
